# netbox_device_roles (Data Source)

Fetches a list of device roles from Netbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `custom_field_filters` (Map of String) Filter device roles by custom field values. Keys are custom field names, values are the filter values.
- `name` (String) Filter by device role name.
- `slug` (String) Filter by device role slug.

### Read-Only

- `device_roles` (Attributes List) List of device roles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--device_roles))
- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.

<a id="nestedatt--device_roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `device_roles`

Read-Only:

- `color` (String) Color for the device role as a 6-digit hex string.
- `description` (String) Description for the device role.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the device role.
- `name` (String) Name of the device role.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the device role.
- `vm_role` (Boolean) Whether this role is used for virtual machines.
